ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the financial period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the financial period */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year of the financial period */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter number (e.g., Q1, Q2) */,
  "is_fiscal_year_end" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the period is the end of the fiscal year */,
  "is_interim_period" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the period is an interim period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector the company operates in */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the company */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "cfo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CFO */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the metric */,
  "is_key_metric" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the metric is a key financial metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the report belongs to */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial period the report covers */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was filed */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., 10-K, 10-Q) */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the report is the final version */,
  "file_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the report file for integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, executive, auditor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the financial record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_overviews" (
  "overview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial overview */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the overview belongs to */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial period the overview covers */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue for the quarter */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* Net profit for the quarter */,
  "ebitda" REAL /* EBITDA for the quarter */,
  "eps_basic" REAL /* Earnings Per Share (Basic) for the quarter */,
  "eps_diluted" REAL /* Earnings Per Share (Diluted) for the quarter */,
  "operating_margin" REAL /* Operating margin for the quarter */,
  "return_on_assets" REAL /* Return on assets for the quarter */,
  "return_on_equity" REAL /* Return on equity for the quarter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("overview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_overviews_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_overviews_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial ratio */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the ratio belongs to */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial period the ratio covers */,
  "gross_margin" REAL /* Gross margin for the quarter */,
  "ebit_margin" REAL /* EBIT margin for the quarter */,
  "net_profit_margin" REAL /* Net profit margin for the quarter */,
  "free_cash_flow_margin" REAL /* Free cash flow margin for the quarter */,
  "ebitda_margin" REAL /* EBITDA margin for the quarter */,
  "operating_cash_flow_margin" REAL /* Operating Cash Flow margin for the quarter */,
  "debt_to_assets_ratio" REAL /* Debt-to-assets ratio for the quarter */,
  "net_income_margin" REAL /* Net income margin for the quarter */,
  "operating_expenses_margin" REAL /* Operating expenses margin for the quarter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_ratios_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_ratios_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial forecast */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the forecast belongs to */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial period the forecast covers */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date the forecast was made */,
  "forecast_revenue" REAL /* Forecasted total revenue for the period */,
  "forecast_net_profit" REAL /* Forecasted net profit for the period */,
  "forecast_eps_basic" REAL /* Forecasted Earnings Per Share (Basic) for the period */,
  "forecast_eps_diluted" REAL /* Forecasted Earnings Per Share (Diluted) for the period */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., optimistic, pessimistic, conservative) */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the forecast (e.g., based on historical performance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_forecasts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_forecasts_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id")
)
